title: アルダンの寄り道講座・初級編

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan and I are on our way back from an
outing when she somewhat timidly proposes
something.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...Trainer. If you're in no particular hurry to get
back, would you be interested in a small detour?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
That's for me to know and you to look forward
to... Hehe! I may not look it, but I happen to be
quite the detour connoisseur.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
After all, since arriving at the academy, I've
grown quite fond of going out to explore after
classes.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... You'll enjoy where we're going, I assure
you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After quite a while, we end up at a famous
aquarium. I've heard so much about this place but
never found the time to come see it for myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Breathtaking, isn't it? Enormous tanks, an
underwater tunnel, and a vibrant array of aquatic
animals...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! ...I must admit I only recently discovered
this place. I stumbled across it on one of my
detours.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I only stepped inside on a whim, but the
experience was more magical than I could have
imagined.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
As they say, you simply won't know until you go.
That's the true charm of the detour.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
There are still so many exhibits I wish to show
you. Come along, I'll guide you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure she's ever been this insistent before. I
find myself charmed by the ambiance as we go
from tank to tank...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: And then the next one's—oh?

text_block_list.name: Small Boy
text_block_list.text: Aww... They're not here...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: A family of orcas is supposed to be housed here...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Granted, it is a massive tank, but there's no sign
of them at all... Perhaps they're resting towards
the back?

text_block_list.name: Small Boy
text_block_list.text: I guess I won't get to see any orcas today... Aw...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Watch this, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Phwwwht.

text_block_list.name: Small Boy
text_block_list.text: Was that an orca?! Where is it?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Hehehe... Where indeed. ♪ Phwwwht! ♪

text_block_list.name: Small Boy
text_block_list.text: ...Whoa?! That was you? Holy cow!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... When I was a child, there was a television
in the hospital and I happened to see a
documentary on animal calls.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I thought that if I learned the noises, I'd one day
be able to converse with animals myself. I spent
quite a lot of time practicing in secret.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Though, it is rather embarrassing to open
up about this now.

text_block_list.name: Small Boy
text_block_list.text: ...Whoa?! Look! An orca!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Baby Orca
text_block_list.text: Phwwht?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Is it responding to Mejiro Ardan's call? ...While I
ponder that question, the whole pod ends up
looking this way in a confused manner.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: My my, this is really something... What a surprise.

text_block_list.name: Small Boy
text_block_list.text: Holy cow! You can talk to orcas! ...Hey, teach me! Teach me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, it would be my pleasure. Firstly, to hit the
right pitch, you'll need to...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
What a wonderful surprise that was. I wonder
what sort of message I was conveying to them
through those calls.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
To think that a childhood dream of mine would
come true today... Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Well, I do feel slightly embarrassed but... Hehe,
thank you. ♪
choice_data_list: Could you make that call again?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh? As in right here and now? Well, I'm not sure
that—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe. Then I suppose I must.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Phwwwht! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, aren't they just? I knew you'd enjoy
yourself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad. What a marvelous feeling it is to be able
to convey how special something is, and to share
it with someone.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... I do hope that we can go on finding many
more wonderful places together.
